# AgentsKit Registry

> Ready-to-use AI agents for AgentsKit. Install with `npx agentskit add <id>` — you own the copied source. 36 agents. Browse them at https://registry.agentskit.io.

- Machine index (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/index.json
- Per-agent bundle (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/<id>.json
- Per-agent page (HTML): https://registry.agentskit.io/agents/<id>
- Per-agent markdown: https://registry.agentskit.io/agents/<id>.md
- MCP endpoint: https://registry.agentskit.io/api/mcp
- Full text: https://registry.agentskit.io/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://registry.agentskit.io/sitemap.xml
- Built by AgentsKit: https://www.agentskit.io

## The AgentsKit ecosystem

- [AgentsKit](https://www.agentskit.io) — The most complete agent toolkit for JavaScript. llms.txt: https://www.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [AgentsKit OS](https://akos.agentskit.io) — The operating system for AI agents in production. llms.txt: https://akos.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [Agents Playbook](https://playbook.agentskit.io) — Best practices for building production AI agents. llms.txt: https://playbook.agentskit.io/llms.txt

## Agents

- [Brief Expander](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-brief-generator.json) — Drafts creative briefs from client kickoff notes. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-brief-generator`.
- [Copy Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-copy-reviewer.json) — Reads draft creative, flags brand-voice misalignment, and suggests rewrites. Routes contentious calls to a human. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-copy-reviewer`.
- [Deck Builder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-deck-builder.json) — Generates pitch + status deck drafts from project artifacts (brief, KPIs, milestone notes). Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-deck-builder`.
- [Schedule Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-schedule-planner.json) — Plans a multi-channel content calendar from approved drafts. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-schedule-planner`.
- [Chart Redactor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-chart-redactor.json) — Redacts HIPAA identifiers from a clinical chart with a DETERMINISTIC backstop: the model does the bulk redaction, then createPIIRedactor re-scans and strips any structured identifier it missed (email/phone/SSN + your MRN/DOB rules) — the emitted chart is always clean of those patterns regardless of the model. Clinical findings preserved. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-chart-redactor`.
- [Intake Triage](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-intake-triage.json) — Classifies an inbound patient message by urgency (emergency/urgent/routine/administrative/unclear) and routes it — typed output with a DETERMINISTIC red-flag safety net: chest pain / stroke / suicidal ideation / severe bleeding force 'emergency' regardless of the model (the model can only escalate, never downgrade). Unclear/emergency → human triage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-intake-triage`.
- [SOAP Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-note-summariser.json) — Converts clinician dictation into a TYPED SOAP note (Subjective/Objective/Assessment/Plan) via structured output; preserves facts verbatim, surfaces missing sections instead of inventing them, always a draft for clinician sign-off. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-note-summariser`.
- [Patient Summary](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-patient-summary.json) — Drafts a TYPED one-page pre-visit summary from chart excerpts (reason, active problems, meds, allergies, vitals trend, follow-ups, open questions); never invents values, always a draft for clinician confirmation. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-patient-summary`.
- [Referral Router](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-referral-router.json) — Routes a referral packet to the receiving specialty + urgency with typed output. Incomplete packets are NOT assigned — missing critical fields (reason/meds/prior workup) are surfaced and the case escalates to a human coordinator. Fail-safe on error. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-referral-router`.
- [Code Review](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/code-review.json) — Deep, low-noise code review: 7 focused lenses (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, design, tests, conventions) fan out per file, then every finding is adversarially verified before thresholds apply. Typed findings with applicable patches. Inputs: local git diff, GitHub PR, files, or a snippet. Outputs: Markdown, SARIF, or PR comments. Blocking CI gate. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add code-review`.
- [Code QA](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-code-qa.json) — Runs tests, lint, type-check on a branch and summarises the failures. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-code-qa`.
- [Dev Implementer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-dev-implementer.json) — Implements QA specs by generating a typed patch and opening a draft GitHub PR against the target branch. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-dev-implementer`.
- [Issue Creator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-issue-creator.json) — Converts each PRD acceptance criterion into a well-formed GitHub issue with title, body, and labels. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-issue-creator`.
- [PRD Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-prd-author.json) — Transforms free-form product descriptions into structured, acceptance-criteria-driven PRDs ready for engineering hand-off. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-prd-author`.
- [QA Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-qa-author.json) — Produces Vitest spec stubs from acceptance criteria so a test skeleton is committed alongside implementation. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-qa-author`.
- [Release Notes Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-release-notes-drafter.json) — Drafts release notes from the merged PRs since the last tag. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-release-notes-drafter`.
- [Test Runner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-test-runner.json) — Parses Vitest stdout/stderr and produces a structured test report with failure details for the code-review agent. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-test-runner`.
- [Docs Chat](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/docs-chat.json) — Provider-agnostic chat over your own docs — grounded RAG answers from retrieved pages, never invented. Category: productivity. Install: `npx agentskit add docs-chat`.
- [KYC Screener](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-kyc-screener.json) — Onboarding KYC screen against sanctions/PEP/adverse-media lists with a DETERMINISTIC fuzzy-match gate: required fields (name/DOB/country) validated up front; strong/exact hits escalate unconditionally (never model-cleared); the model only downgrades weak near-misses. Typed risk verdict + human sign-off. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-kyc-screener`.
- [Sanctions Screener](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-sanctions-screener.json) — Screens a customer/counterparty against a sanctions list with a DETERMINISTIC fuzzy-match gate: strong/exact hits escalate unconditionally (never model-cleared), the model only adjudicates weak near-misses (and can only make screening stricter). Typed verdict + human sign-off. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-sanctions-screener`.
- [Transaction Investigator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-transaction-investigator.json) — Scans a transaction history for anomalous patterns (velocity, structuring, geo, round-number, rapid-movement) and drafts a TYPED case file as canonical Findings citing the transaction IDs + rule. Two modes (fraud / aml SAR-ready); always a draft for human review, fail-safe (insufficientEvidence over false positives), never freezes accounts or files SARs. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-transaction-investigator`.
- [Knowledge Promoter Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/knowledge-promoter.json) — Turns curated private notes into public documentation PRs — classify, sanitize to vendor-neutral, adversarial leak-gate, then open one draft PR. Never merges; a human reviews. Category: ops. Install: `npx agentskit add knowledge-promoter`.
- [Case Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-analyst.json) — Extracts parties, dates, claims, and procedural posture from a case file. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-analyst`.
- [Case Summariser](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-summariser.json) — Produces matter-level summaries from a set of reviewed documents. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-summariser`.
- [Doc Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-doc-drafter.json) — Drafts memos, motions, and client correspondence from approved facts. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-doc-drafter`.
- [Legal Doc Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-doc-reviewer.json) — One configurable legal-review agent (mode: contract | discovery | privilege) that supersedes the separate contract-reviewer, discovery-reviewer, and privilege-spotter. Produces typed findings via structured output; privileged/high findings require attorney review. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-doc-reviewer`.
- [Redaction Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-redaction-bot.json) — Redacts PII from a legal document with a DETERMINISTIC backstop (createPIIRedactor strips any structured identifier the model missed — SSN/email/phone + your gov-ID/account rules), and surfaces privileged spans for attorney review instead of silently redacting them. Output is always clean of the covered patterns. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-redaction-bot`.
- [Brief Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-brief-analyst.json) — Reads campaign briefs and extracts structured objectives, audience segments, key messages, and success metrics. Anchors all downstream work to brand voice and persona knowledge. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-brief-analyst`.
- [Calendar Digest Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-calendar-digest-author.json) — Turns the week's scheduled social posts into a TYPED digest (per-channel groups + a ready-to-paste Slack markdown block). Delivery is optional and HITL-gated — reported delivered only when the transport really returned an id; never fakes a post. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-calendar-digest-author`.
- [Competitor Researcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-competitor-researcher.json) — Searches + fetches competitor web content (webSearch / fetchUrl), diffs it against the RAG competitor baseline, and produces a structured competitive-landscape report. Hardened: fetched pages are treated as attacker-controlled data (prompt-injection defense), and unfetchable sources are flagged, never fabricated. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-competitor-researcher`.
- [Copy Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-copy-author.json) — Produces three distinct copy variants — bold/challenger, warm/story-led, and precise/evidence-based — from the structured brief and competitive context. Every variant targets a specific persona and channel. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-copy-author`.
- [Social Publisher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-social-publisher.json) — Formats one approved copy variant per platform and DELIVERS it through caller-injected transports. Real delivery or honest failure (no faked sends), fail-closed HITL (nothing posts without explicit approval), typed result with the real provider id per platform. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-social-publisher`.
- [Research Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/research.json) — Citation-first research agent. Searches the web, reads sources, and answers with every claim anchored to a URL. Category: research. Install: `npx agentskit add research`.
- [Escalation Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-escalation-drafter.json) — Turns a ticket + agent notes into a TYPED internal escalation draft (impact / tried / need / SLA). A deterministic PII backstop re-scans every field and strips raw email / phone / ids the model leaked; always a draft for the agent to review before posting. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-escalation-drafter`.
- [KB Searcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-kb-searcher.json) — Matches a support ticket to the top knowledge-base articles as TYPED hits with a 1-5 confidence score. Optional retriever grounds answers in YOUR corpus — only retrieved candidates can be cited; never invents an article (returns noMatch + a suggested topic instead). Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-kb-searcher`.
- [Triage Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-triage-bot.json) — Classifies an inbound support ticket by topic + severity (P1-P4) + queue with TYPED output, and a deterministic red-flag net that forces P1 on outage / data-loss / security language (the model can only raise severity, never bury a P1). Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-triage-bot`.
